summary: Warm, near‑soundboard audience recording of a performance hailed as one of the best shows ever.
review: The audience (AUD) source is praised for its warmth and clarity, standing out as possibly the best crowd tape of this concert and even rivaling top soundboard recordings. Reviewers also describe the show itself as one of the Dead’s greatest performances, though no specific songs are called out.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review rates both the performance and recording extremely high; limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Warm tonal balance, very clear for an audience tape; described as nearly on par with top soundboard recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer declares it one of the best shows ever, implying strong overall pacing and energy throughout.
